data.title: Hippocratic AI Expands Footprint, Partners with Leading Health Systems to Improve Patient Outcomes
data.description: A company based in Palo Alto, California, called Hippocratic AI has announced the addition of new partners to enhance patient outcomes through the use of secure generative AI Voice Agents.

data.title: Recall: 32 Degrees heated socks sold at Costco. Over 200,000 units recalled due to burn reports, says U.S. safety regulators.
data.description: Safety regulators in the U.S. have connected socks produced by the brand 32 Degrees to incidents involving first- and second-degree burns.

data.title: PMC Organometallix Announces Price Increase on All Products
data.description: Officials in Mount Laurel, New Jersey, at PMC Organometallix, Inc. have declared a price increase of 10-25% on all product lines worldwide starting May 1, 2026, or as agreements allow due to significant shifts in market conditions. The decision is a result of ongoing cost pressures from crucial inputs such as surging raw material expenses and increasing freight and logistics costs. The company, which has been absorbing these hikes, is now compelled to adjust prices to align with the current economic landscape.

data.title: BTC may hit $85K or drop to $70K within 30 days amid smart money bets against retail optimism. $2.9M VanEck vision in play.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently facing a crucial challenge at the $79,000 resistance level, as institutional investors are skeptical about the optimism among retail traders. This situation could lead to a potential breakout towards $85,000 or a rejection towards $70,000 in the next 30 days. The likelihood of a breakout stands at 42%, suggesting a high-stakes scenario for Bitcoin.

data.title: BGIN BLOCKCHAIN LIMITED Reports Unaudited Financial Results for the Full Year of 2025
data.description: Today, in Singapore, BGIN BLOCKCHAIN LIMITED (NASDAQ: BGIN) unveiled its unaudited financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025. BGIN is a digital asset technology firm specializing in proprietary cryptocurrency mining technologies and manufacturing cryptocurrency mining hardware.

data.title: Rivalry Announces Board and Management Changes
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Rivalry Corp. (TSXV: RVLY) disclosed modifications to its board of directors and management in the midst of the Company's continuous operational shift.

data.title: Paul Mueller Company Announces Its First Quarter Earnings of 2026
data.description: In Springfield, Missouri, on April 24, 2026, Paul Mueller Company (OTC: MUEL) released its first-quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026.

data.title: CASEKOO ClipSafe™. LinKOO Silver Ease. You, hands-free.
data.description: On April 24, 2026, in Los Angeles, CASEKOO, a lifestyle brand known for its design-centric approach, launched a new line of stylish iphone cases. The brand, targeting Innovation Enthusiasts and Style Pioneers, focuses on creating products that cater to human behaviors rather than fixed norms. One of their latest products, the LinKOO, aims to combine practicality and aesthetic appeal for users on the go.

data.title: HYTN Announces Extension of Marketing Program
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC - HYTN Innovations Inc., a cannabis-focused pharmaceutical manufacturer, has revealed that it is extending its partnership with MCS Market Communication Service GmbH based in Germany. The engagement, set to begin on April 24, 2026, will last around 60 days or until the budget runs out, with the possibility of earlier termination or extension. This update follows previous announcements on January 9, March 2, and March 20, 2026. Interested parties can contact MCS at info@mcsmarket.de or +49 177 248 1220. HYTN is listed as CSE: HYTN, FSE: 85W0, and on OTC PINK as HYTNF.

data.title: Return to Freedom: U.S. Forest Service must halt Arizona wild horse roundups
data.description: On April 24, 2026, in Lompoc, California, Return to Freedom Wild Horse Conservation called on the U.S. Forest Service to halt the unauthorized removal of wild horses from Sitgreaves National Forest in Arizona. The conservation group sent a letter to the U.S. Forest Service requesting an immediate end to these actions.

data.title: AMBULNZ WORKERS JOIN TEAMSTERS LOCAL 623
data.description: In Philadelphia, on April 24, 2026, a total of 218 employees consisting of EMTs, Paramedics, and Drivers working for Ambulnz decided to be represented by Teamsters Local 623 through a successful vote. This majority decision signifies a strong desire among the workers to advocate for improved working conditions and benefits as a unified group. This move highlights a commitment to collective bargaining and solidarity among the employees in pursuing better outcomes in their workplace.

data.title: Fairfax Announces Conference Call
data.description: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited (TSX: FFH and FFH.U) has scheduled a conference call on Friday, May 1, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its first-quarter results for 2026. These results will be disclosed after market close on Thursday, April 30, 2026, and will be posted on the company's website at www.fairfax.ca. The conference call will include a presentation by the company, followed by a question and answer session. To join the call, dial 1 (800) 369-2143 (Canada and U.S.) or 1 (312) 470-0063 (International) with the passcode “FAIRFAX”.

data.title: Ferrero begins production of Nutella Peanut at Chicago area plant
data.description: A $75 million investment has been made in Ferrero's Franklin Park, IL plant, resulting in the creation of 50 new jobs. This expansion will focus on producing the brand's first-ever new flavor. Ferrero North America, a division of the Ferrero Group, announced this development, marking a significant milestone for the company.

data.title: Community Effort and Santa Cruz Toyota Provide Life-Changing Mobility for Local Family
data.description: In April 24, 2026, in Santa Cruz, California, a family from Santa Cruz County is receiving a mobility vehicle that will drastically improve their lives. The vehicle was made possible through months of fundraising efforts within the community. The donation was a result of the collective support and generosity of neighbors, local organizations, and supporters from various areas. This act of kindness reflects the unity and compassion of the community towards providing essential assistance to those in need.
